title: Settings & Customisation
seoTitle: Game of Darts Settings & Customisation | BarkinMad Studios
description: Review Game of Darts appearance, file management, auto-post, DartBot level, voice, tracking, and premium settings.
summary: Settings cover data/file management, appearance, Game Center auto-posting, DartBot level, tracking guidance, and gated development-only controls.
heroImageAlt: Placeholder artwork for pending Game of Darts settings image
sourceNotes: Development-gated controls are identified separately and should not be treated as public release features without verification.

sections.heading: Release-facing settings
paragraphs: The settings screen includes file management, space usage, data deletion/cleanup, appearance settings, leaderboard auto-posting, DartBot level controls when access is available, and tracking guidance.
Auto-post to leaderboards defaults to enabled in AppSettings unless changed by the user.

sections.heading: Gated settings
paragraphs: High-contrast and voice settings are development-gated in the inspected source. Debug localization appears in debug or simulator builds.
DartBot level settings are shown when Pro, DartBot, 48-hour access, or development access is active.
